catalog_entry.summary: The IHO-IOC GEBCO Cook Book is a comprehensive guide published by the International Hydrographic Organization and Intergovernmental Oceanographic Commission, providing detailed information on bathymetric data compilation and quality control procedures.

provider.name: General Bathymetric Chart of the Oceans (GEBCO)

variables.long_name: Bathymetry data compilation and quality control procedures
